_evidence: IDE integration surface — captured live inside an IDE coding agent (Claude Code) that has the CoinMarketCap Agent Hub MCP connected. This is the 5th Agent Hub surface: MCP, x402, CMC CLI, Skills, and IDE integrations. The agent discovered (find_skill) and executed (execute_skill) a CMC platform skill with zero local code — proof the Hub is wired natively into the IDE runtime, not just described.

find_skill.query: Detect crypto market regime and positioning stress: Fear & Greed vs perp funding extremity, open-interest change, and price stretch divergence for BTC to decide fade-the-crowd vs ride-the-trend.

decision_report.title: Perp Contract Analysis
decision_report.conclusion: BTC market-flow read over 30 x 1d rows (~30d): current price 64814.7, OI/market-cap ratio 1.20%, funding 0.002075%, price change -15.61%, OI change -14.37%, futures CVD latest_delta -8.04B (-2045%), spot CVD latest_delta -1.56B (-1087%).

action_guidance.reference_action: Treat perp structure as secondary because OI/market-cap is 1.20% versus the 10% influence threshold; require clearer quantified confirmation first.
